_note: Simplified movement/breathing pacers for the Tai Chi tab, rendered by the SHARED form-model engine (web/js/formModel.js) — the same engine that powers Sports at Home. These are gentle tempo/breath guides, not instructed Tai Chi form (instructor-reviewed videos are the pending deliverable). Authored conservatively in the 240x340 joint model; only movements whose keyframes are verified ship here.
disclaimer: A simplified breathing-and-tempo pacer — move slowly and within comfort. Not a substitute for instructed Tai Chi form. Stop for chest pain, breathlessness, dizziness, or new joint pain.

movements.name: Opening — raise & lower arms

cues.Raise: Breathe in as the arms float up to shoulder height.
cues.Lower: Breathe out as the arms sink slowly down.
cues.Settle: Rest. Let the breath settle before the next cycle.

staticCues: Stand tall and relaxed, feet about hip-width, knees soft.
Float both arms forward and up to shoulder height as you breathe in.
Lower the arms slowly as you breathe out.
Keep shoulders soft throughout; move only within comfort.

movements.name: Weight shift — side to side

cues.Left: Shift your weight smoothly onto the left foot.
cues.Right: Transfer slowly across onto the right foot.

staticCues: Stand with feet a little wider than hip-width, knees soft.
Shift your weight slowly onto one foot, staying tall.
Transfer smoothly across to the other foot.
Keep a hand near support if your balance is unsure.
